title: Research & Deployment Co. Cotton Sweatshirt
description: A cut-and-sew cotton sweatshirt built as a quiet research-lab uniform: cream pinstripes, small chest systems, sleeve waves, and restrained deployment typography.

meme.brief: All-over cotton sweatshirt inspired by research-lab uniforms, quiet streetwear, skater restraint, and panel-aware sleeve waves. Make it feel like a real garment, not a poster.
meme.rightsNote: Original apparel system. Do not copy Supply Co products, official OpenAI marks, protected streetwear logos, real team marks, screenshots, usernames, or public-figure likenesses.

title: Codex Rate Reset Long Sleeve Tee
description: A black long sleeve tee for the 429-to-200 recovery ritual: compact front reset mark, sleeve telemetry, and a quiet back-office stamp.

care: Machine-wash cold, inside-out, on a gentle cycle with similar colors and mild detergent
Avoid fabric softener; use non-chlorine bleach only when necessary
Cool iron inside-out without ironing the print; do not dry-clean
productDetails.origin: The blank garment is sourced from Nicaragua, Honduras, or the United States. Printing and fulfillment are performed on demand by Printful; the production location may vary.
productDetails.productionTime: Production usually takes 2–5 business days before shipping. Switzerland delivery is estimated at 7–15 business days in total and is not guaranteed.
productDetails.mockupNotice: Product images are digital mockups. Placement, scale, and color can vary slightly on the finished DTG-printed garment.

sizeGuide.tolerance: Supplier measurements may vary by up to 5 cm. Measure a similar garment laid flat.

meme.brief: Long sleeve tee inspired by Codex rate-limit lore, reset windows, retry-after headers, queue pressure, and the relief of a clean 200 after a 429. Treat the idea as original systems merch: no copied posts, screenshots, usernames, official marks, or real service branding.
meme.rightsNote: Original Codex-native apparel concept using generic HTTP/status and queue language. Do not copy social posts, screenshots, usernames, official marks, protected service branding, public figures, or real team logos.

title: Solward Index Cotton Sweatshirt
description: A warm all-over cotton sweatshirt that turns the Sol inside joke into a quiet brightness index: angular contour fields, amber signal paths, and concentric sleeve systems.

meme.brief: All-over cotton sweatshirt inspired by the owner-supplied team wordplay The Sol Shines. Translate the optimistic model-weather joke into a premium garment system: warm daylight field, measured brightness contours, restrained identity, and intentional ring-based sleeves. Avoid literal sun illustration and poster logic.
meme.rightsNote: Owner-supplied wordplay rendered as an original abstract apparel system. No official logos, company marks, model logos, copied post language, screenshots, usernames, likenesses, or protected product layouts.

prompts: Flat six-placement all-over cotton sweatshirt system on a warm ivory field. Use three sparse nested angular contour outlines and one short amber accent path. Center-monument front with centered primary typography and geometry on one central axis; repeat the contour family more quietly on the back. Both sleeves use three concentric rings, a crosshair, and a mirrored accent notch. Keep the label panel and inside label restrained with supplied local text. Exact text is rendered locally.
workflowNotes: Trend premise was supplied directly by the owner on 2026-07-21; no X post records were fabricated or attached.
This manual candidate is not eligible for the automated weekly release path without separate live provenance and explicit release approval.
Concept board generated from the accepted garment spec with Codex built-in image generation; deterministic local composition owns production panels and exact text.

recipe.title: Clean Slate Club Cotton Sweatshirt
recipe.rationale: This direction reads the reset as a fictional sports-club ritual. A badge-stack layout and original circular badge geometry give the joke collectible uniform energy, while the checkerboard field and vertically repeated badge rings create strong bilateral panel logic. Badge-repeat sleeves make the whole sweatshirt feel like one deliberate club kit.

visualCritic.revisionBrief: Preserve the approved sports-club direction. Move the back subline "CLEAR MINDS RETURN" downward or interrupt the outer ivory ring behind it so the full phrase remains unobstructed. On each sleeve, separate the small "CLUB STANDARD" caption from the large vertical CLEAR/READY word by at least one cap-height, and shift the upper badge stack slightly inward so meaningful ring details are less vulnerable at the outer sleeve seam. Do not alter the palette, checkerboard field, primary front badge, or front/back statements.

approval.notes: Preview only. A separate sourced research run, human approval, provider synchronization, and explicit release authority are required before publication.

recipe.title: Sun Break Victory Cotton Sweatshirt
recipe.rationale: The strongest direction turns the joke into a relaxed Northern California release-day victory lap. The coastal-surf world, rounded-surf typography, horizon-band layout, sun-stripes field, and sun-wave sleeves create one immediate garment gesture: the entire sweatshirt feels like daylight rolling across it. Large quiet areas keep the exact hero phrase dominant while coordinated back, sleeve, and label copy make the all-over system feel intentional.

recipe.title: Tastemaxxing Cutline Cotton Sweatshirt
recipe.rationale: This direction translates the joke into decisive Bay Area skate-poster energy. A condensed-zine type system occupies a split-field layout, while the pinstripe aperture and checker-cuff sleeves turn editing into a sharp visual cut without using literal tools or interface imagery.

sleeves.motif: A large two-tone checker field resolves into a strong checked cuff band on each sleeve.
sleeves.caption: HARD CHOICES DAILY

findings: Accepted: garment-first AOP cotton plan with panel-specific sleeves, front, back, label panel, and inside label.
Accepted: production files can be composed from exact selected template dimensions.

strengths: Strong whole-garment system: dark pinstripes, cream geometry, and acid-green accents remain consistent across all panels.
Front, back, and sleeves have deliberate roles: front establishes the hero phrase, back carries the supporting statement, and sleeves create a clear KEEP/CUT opposition.
Typography is readable at garment scale with strong contrast and adequate separation from visible seams.
Checker sleeve bands provide an effective visual anchor and distinguish the sleeves without disrupting torso coherence.
Label artwork is present, legible, consistent with the brand system, and contains no apparent unintended text.
Deterministic prepress passed all six required PNG placements at exact provider dimensions.
No protected marks, public figures, copied social content, or misleading official affiliation are visible.

prompts: Create flat panel-aware artwork in the minimal-type world using a serif-editorial type system, center-monument layout, and restrained pinstripe field. recipe.title: Archive Monument Cotton Sweatshirt
recipe.rationale: The strongest direction treats the joke as a quiet museum acquisition. The minimal-type world and serif-editorial system place the phrase on a center-monument axis inside the pinstripe pattern's rectangular aperture. Generous margins, sparse ladder sleeves, and one vermilion accent create a collectible archival garment without false institutional branding.

sleeves.caption: ARCHIVE SERIES

findings: Accepted: garment-first AOP cotton plan with panel-specific sleeves, front, back, label panel, and inside label.

strengths: Front, back, and sleeves form a coherent archival system through consistent pinstripes, typography, ladder geometry, and restrained vermilion accents.
The front establishes a clear hierarchy around DAVINCI-002, while the back is deliberately differentiated with ARCHIVAL COMPUTE and RELEASE MEMORY.
Sleeves are intentionally asymmetric, with distinct SIGNAL and SHIFT text and offset accent rungs.

visualCritic.revisionBrief: Preserve the approved garment direction. On label_inside, slightly reduce the same line to add clear left/right padding while retaining all existing wording and hierarchy. Re-export both placements at their currently validated provider dimensions.
